headline: Air Products' Executive Leadership to Speak at J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 18
summary: Air Products' (NYSE:APD) Chief Executive Officer Eduardo Menezes and Chief Financial Officer Melissa Schaeffer will participate in a fireside chat at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 8:05 a.m. USET.

headline: Goldman Sachs Large Cap Equity Fund Q4 2025 Portfolio Activity
summary: Our position in American pharmaceutical company, Eli Lilly & Company (1.8%), was a top contributor to relative returns during the fourth quarter.
